title: Isabl Knowledge Tree (root)
summary: Top-level navigation for Isabl platform documentation organized by capabilities and use cases (CLI, data import, applications, execution, settings, utilities, errors, automation, and user-facing docs). Each leaf points to relevant source documents by doc_id.

children.title: API & HTTP Helpers
children.summary: Client-side helpers for communicating with the Isabl API: request building, retries, pagination, resource CRUD, authentication, and Isabl-specific serialization wrappers.

children.title: HTTP & Request Helpers
children.summary: Generic request utilities, URL normalization, retries and a high-level api_request wrapper used by CLI operations.

children.title: Authentication & Token Management
children.summary: Helpers for obtaining, caching and attaching API authentication tokens to requests.

children.title: Pagination, Batching & Iteration
children.summary: Helpers to iterate paginated API endpoints and to batch or chunk work for bulk operations.

children.title: Resource CRUD & Retrieval
children.summary: Convenience routines for fetching, listing, creating, patching and deleting API resources, plus specialized getters for projects, experiments and analyses.

children.title: IsablDict & Serialization Helpers
children.summary: Utilities to convert arbitrary Python objects and nested dicts into IsablDict instances and Isabl-specific accessors (custom field access, popping and representations).

children.title: Analysis-specific API Helpers & Notifications
children.summary: Helpers to fetch/validate analysis results, patch analysis statuses in bulk or singly, and send error/notification emails.

children.title: Application Framework & Lifecycle
children.summary: APIs, hooks and helpers to author, validate, run and collect results from Isabl Applications — the metadata-driven analysis units that submit jobs and record tracked analyses.

children.title: Application Interface & Core Lifecycle
children.summary: AbstractApplication contract, dependency resolution, command generation and the run orchestration used to create and submit analyses.

children.title: Results, Artifacts & Post-completion Hooks
children.summary: Hooks and helpers to collect per-analysis, per-individual and per-project results, attach logs/scripts, pattern-based result discovery, and to expose results via API.

children.title: Merging & Aggregation Workflows
children.summary: Project- and individual-level merge hooks, validation and the logic to create or submit aggregated merge analyses.

children.title: Validation & Input Guards
children.summary: Rich set of pre-flight checks and validators to ensure correct experiments, sample roles, data types, species, assembly compatibility, bed/bam presence, pairing rules and other constraints before launching analyses.

children.title: CLI Integration, Artifacts & Notifications
children.summary: Helpers to expose applications as CLI commands, generate job scripts/log paths, patch status from jobs, send analytics after runs and notify project analysts.

children.title: Data Import & Storage Management
children.summary: Tools and import engines to associate raw files with experiments, register reference resources (BEDs, genomes), create storage directories, symlink/move files, and validate ownership/readability.

children.title: Importers & Import Workflows
children.summary: Local import engines and batch import features to discover, match and commit raw files to experiments and to register reference resources for assemblies/techniques.

children.title: File Operations, Linking & Delivery
children.summary: Filesystem operations used during import and delivery: symlinks, copying, moving, symlinking experiments into project directories and exposing analysis outputs to targets.

children.title: Storage Directories & Path Management
children.summary: Helpers to compute and create hashed or structured storage directories, claim storage URLs for instances, update storage metadata and to soft-delete or trash analysis storage.

children.title: BED, Reference Files & Preprocessing
children.summary: Tools to process BED files (sort/bgzip/tabix), import and register technique/assembly reference data and prepare capture kit resources for pipelines.

children.title: Validation During Import
children.summary: Checks performed by importers such as file-type detection, ownership/readability assertions and raw-data inspection for matching and QC.

children.title: Batch Systems & Job Execution
children.summary: Integrations and submission helpers for local and HPC schedulers (LSF, Slurm, SGE), including array submission helpers and scheduler-specific cleanup/seff/exit jobs.

children.title: Supported Schedulers & Submission Entrypoints
children.summary: Main submission functions that group commands by methods and hand off to scheduler-specific submission implementations.

children.title: Array Submission Helpers & Cleanup Jobs
children.summary: Scheduler-specific helpers to submit job arrays, schedule cleanup/exit/seff helper jobs, and support throttling, waiting and resource metric collection.

children.title: Local Execution & Development
children.summary: Running jobs serially on the local machine for debugging or small-scale execution.

children.title: CLI Commands & User Tools
children.summary: Top-level CLI entrypoint, user-facing commands for authentication, data retrieval, job/process management, and convenience helpers for interacting with Isabl from the terminal.

children.title: CLI Entry & App Organization
children.summary: Main CLI entrypoints and helpers that organize available applications for CLI presentation or invocation.

children.title: User-facing Commands (authentication, retrieval, management)
children.summary: Commands exposed to end users for login, retrieving metadata/results/paths/data, running and merging analyses, running signals, and patching statuses or results.

children.title: Command Options & Callbacks
children.summary: Helpers to create reusable Click options, callbacks and validators used by CLI commands (analysis filters, dependency selection, result-key helpers).

children.title: Settings & Configuration
children.summary: Management of system-wide and per-user settings, dynamic import resolution for configured values, and helpers to build application-specific settings structures.

children.title: Settings Objects & Persistence
children.summary: Classes and persistence primitives for per-user and base settings, including JSON-backed UserSettings and BaseSettings with defaults and import handling.

children.title: Dynamic Imports & Application Resolution
children.summary: Utilities that perform dynamic imports for configured import strings, import valid application identifiers from settings, and build application-specific settings dictionaries.

children.title: Runtime Accessors & Identity
children.summary: Helpers to fetch the current API username, client configuration and to determine whether the running user is an admin.

children.title: Utilities & Filesystem Helpers
children.summary: General-purpose utilities used across the CLI and importers for filesystem operations, archiving, rsync command generation, results discovery, UX messages and debugging aids.

children.title: Filesystem, Links & Archiving
children.summary: Directory creation honoring mode, forced link/symlink helpers, tar archiving and directory size inspection utilities.

children.title: Transfers & rsync Helpers
children.summary: Helpers to build rsync command lines and to check installed rsync compatibility for append/verify features.

children.title: Results Discovery & Experiment Utilities
children.summary: Utilities that find analysis results on experiment records, wrapper helpers to obtain single results with clearer errors, and traversal helpers for nested dicts.

children.title: CLI UX, Analytics & Debug Helpers
children.summary: Message helpers for commit guidance and titles, decorators/application wrappers to send telemetry, and debugging utilities.

children.title: Exceptions & Validators
children.summary: Custom exception types used across isabl_cli and validation helpers for CLI options, files and pair definitions.

children.title: Custom Exceptions
children.summary: Package-level exception hierarchy and common error types to signal validation issues, missing resources, configuration problems and automation failures.

children.title: Validators & CLI Callbacks
children.summary: Validators for file/directory pattern arguments, and for resolving sample pairs from lists or TSV files used as Click callbacks.

children.title: Signals & Automation
children.summary: Signal functions and automation patterns that drive post-import or status-change workflows, and CLI triggers to run or rerun signals.

children.title: Signal Handlers & Runners
children.summary: Signal definitions to resume, force-restart, or remotely trigger analyses and functions that bridge web-initiated events to CLI-executable triggers.

children.title: Documentation & Guides
children.summary: Top-level user and developer documentation pages explaining Isabl features, deployment, import workflows, data model and tutorials.

children.title: Overview & Getting Started
children.summary: Home page, quick start and onboarding materials to get an Isabl instance running and to register metadata/import data.

children.title: Data Model & Importing Data
children.summary: Documentation describing Isabl's normalized data model (individuals, samples, experiments) and detailed import workflows for raw data and YAML manifests.

children.title: Applications & Workflows
children.summary: Guides for developing metadata-driven Applications that submit to multiple compute backends and how to write/author apps for the platform.

children.title: Deployment, Settings & Maintenance
children.summary: Instructions for production deployment, configuring Isabl settings, backups and operational best practices.

children.title: Operational Tips & Privacy
children.summary: Extra tips for CLI usability, scheduler integrations, and notes on project privacy and access control.

children.title: Factories, Options & Small Helpers
children.summary: Lightweight helpers for lazy factories and reusable CLI option builders used by isabl-cli commands.

children.title: Factories
children.summary: Factory accessors used to lazily obtain collections such as projects.

children.title: CLI Option Builders
children.summary: Factories for Click options to standardize analysis filters and dependency resolution from CLI inputs.
